testsuite.name: Eulynx.Validation.dll

testcase.name: Compilation.CompileC (Generic requirements for SCI,S_SCI_Adj_Sec)
testcase.failure:
Assert.AreEqual failed. Expected:<0>. Actual:<2>. Stack Trace: at Eulynx.Validation.Compilation.CompileC(String package, String className) in /builds/eulynx-live/model-validation/Eulynx.Validation/Compilation.cs:line 51 at InvokeStub_Compilation.CompileC(Object, Object, IntPtr*) at System.Reflection.MethodInvoker.Invoke(Object obj, IntPtr* args, BindingFlags invokeAttr)
Standard Output: make: Entering directory '/builds/eulynx-live/model-validation/Eulynx.Validation/bin/Debug/Eulynx/C/GenericRequirementsForSci' cc -c -o SSciAdjSec.o SSciAdjSec.c make: Leaving directory '/builds/eulynx-live/model-validation/Eulynx.Validation/bin/Debug/Eulynx/C/GenericRequirementsForSci' SSciAdjSec.c: In function 'make_state_SSciAdjsSecBehaviour__Active__Establishing': SSciAdjSec.c:30:52: error: 'ResultValue__Match' undeclared (first use in this function) 30 | self->OutMsgPdiVersionCheck__9827.Value.Result = ResultValue__Match; | ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ SSciAdjSec.c:30:52: note: each undeclared identifier is reported only once for each function it appears in SSciAdjSec.c:39:52: error: 'ResultValue__NotMatch' undeclared (first use in this function) 39 | self->OutMsgPdiVersionCheck__9827.Value.Result = ResultValue__NotMatch; | ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ make: *** [<builtin>: SSciAdjSec.o] Error 1
